AuditEvent.String2: CertificationEmail Trigger for Attribute Change Event is triggered Statr Certification Campaign for User for Attribute Change and Sending a email to the User's Manager
AuditEvent.String3: Launched workflow 'CertificationEmail Trigger for Attribute Change: Hinata Hyuga'
AuditEvent.String4: Attribute 'department' changed from ITRADD to ITRAD
